Title: MemorySmith.Agent — World Event Type Catalog (25 Events)
Content:
All event types are sealed records in Agent.Core/Events/WorldEvents.cs, inheriting from abstract record WorldEvent(DateTimeOffset Timestamp).

The wire protocol uses lowercase JSON event names. WebSocketBridge.ParseEvent routes by 'event' field.

## Event Catalog

| # | Event Type | Wire Name | Key Fields | Produced By | Projector Handler |
|---|-----------|-----------|-----------|-------------|------------------|
| 1 | SpawnEvent | 'spawn' | Pos, Health, Food | Node.js bot.once('spawn') | ApplySpawn |
| 2 | HealthEvent | 'health' | Health, Food | Node.js bot.on('health') | ApplyHealth |
| 3 | GameModeChangedEvent | 'gameMode' | Mode | Node.js game mode change | ApplyGameModeChanged |
| 4 | DamageTakenEvent | synthetic (C#) | PreviousHealth, Health, Delta, Food | AgentBackgroundService from HealthEvent deltas | StoreFacts only |
| 5 | MoveEvent | 'move'/'moveComplete' | Pos | Node.js pathfinder updates | ApplyMove |
| 6 | BlockMinedEvent | 'blockMined' | Block, Count, Pos, BlockPosition | Node.js mine action | ApplyBlockMined |
| 7 | ItemCollectedEvent | 'itemCollected' | Item, Count | Node.js playerCollect (Sprint 35 P0-A) | ApplyItemCollected |
| 8 | MineCompleteEvent | 'mineComplete' | Block, Mined, TargetCount, BlockPosition | Node.js end-of-mine-loop (Sprint 35 P0-B) | StoreFacts only |
| 9 | ItemCraftedEvent | 'craftComplete' | Item, Count | Node.js craft action | ApplyItemCrafted |
| 10 | ItemConsumedEvent | 'smeltComplete' (stub) | Item, Count | Node.js (Sprint 38 P4-A) | ApplyItemConsumed |
| 11 | ChatEvent | 'chat' | Username, Message, OnlinePlayers, PlayerPos? | Node.js chat listener | StoreFacts only |
| 12 | ErrorEvent | 'error' | Action, Message | Node.js error handler | StoreFacts only |
| 13 | BlockNotFoundEvent | 'blockNotFound' | Block, MinedCount | Node.js block find miss | StoreFacts only |
| 14 | CraftCompleteEvent | 'craftComplete' | Item, Count | Node.js craft result | StoreFacts only |
| 15 | SmeltCompleteEvent | 'smeltComplete' | Input, Result, Count | Node.js smelt result | StoreFacts only |
| 16 | DeathEvent | 'death' | Pos | Node.js bot.on('death') | StoreFacts only |
| 17 | StatusEvent | 'status' | Pos, Health, Food, Inventory, GameMode? | Node.js getStatus response | ApplyStatus (full sync) |
| 18 | BlockPlacedEvent | 'blockPlaced' | X, Y, Z, Block | Node.js place action | StoreFacts only |
| 19 | WanderCompleteEvent | 'wanderComplete' | Pos, TargetX, TargetZ | Node.js wander success | StoreFacts only |
| 20 | WanderFailedEvent | 'wanderFailed' | Message, Pos | Node.js wander failure | StoreFacts only |
| 21 | KickedEvent | 'kicked' | Reason | Node.js disconnect/kick | StoreFacts only |
| 22 | FlatAreaFoundEvent | 'flatAreaFound' | X, Y, Z, Area, Min/Max X/Z, SearchedRadius | Node.js findFlatArea result | StoreFacts (writes BuildFactKeys.LastFlatArea) |
| 23 | MineAbortedEvent | 'mineAborted' | Block, Mined, TargetCount, BlockPosition? | Node.js stop signal abort (Sprint 40 P0-C) | StoreFacts only |
| 24 | StopCompleteEvent | 'stopComplete' | (Timestamp only) | Node.js stop acknowledged (Sprint 40 P0-C) | StoreFacts only |
| 25 | ReachableBlockFoundEvent | 'reachableBlockFound' | Block, X, Y, Z, EuclideanDistance, PathDistance | Node.js findReachableBlock (Sprint 40 P0-B) | StoreFacts only |

## Event Routing in ProcessEventsAsync (AgentBackgroundService.cs ~line 400)

After projector apply, each event type routes to correlation completion:
- SpawnEvent → logs spawn position
- StatusEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('GetStatus'/'Status')
- BlockMinedEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('MineBlock')
- CraftCompleteEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('CraftItem')
- SmeltCompleteEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('SmeltItem')
- KickedEvent → cancel _connectionCts (force reconnect)
- ChatEvent → write to _chatChannel (offloaded to ChatConsumerAsync)
- FlatAreaFoundEvent (area >= 25) → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('FindFlatArea')
- FlatAreaFoundEvent (area < 25) → track zero-area scans, fallback after 2
- MoveEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('MoveTo')
- WanderCompleteEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('Wander')
- WanderFailedEvent → FailCorrelatedActionByTool('Wander')
- MineAbortedEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('MineBlock') (terminal)
- StopCompleteEvent → log emergency stop acknowledgment
- ReachableBlockFoundEvent → CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool('FindReachableBlock')
- Default → TryRouteAsError (maps BlockNotFoundEvent/ErrorEvent to _gameErrors)

## StoreFacts Method

Records typed event properties as prefixed facts (e.g., event:Spawn:Health=20). Prefix uses GetEventKind(ev) which strips 'Event' suffix from type name. SourceFor: ErrorEvent → FactSource.Inferred, everything else → FactSource.Observed.
